plugins.name: design-council
plugins.description: Channels five master designers — Jony Ive, Dieter Rams, Zaha Hadid, Bjarke Ingels, and Don Norman — as a consultative panel for any design work.

plugins.name: mission-command
plugins.description: Runs a scarce flagship model as the conductor of a cheap-model fleet: vision-first autonomy, per-agent model/effort pinning, disk-portable protocols, and gated autonomy.
